mapper.sql: id, category, code, name_ko, type_label, location, manufacturer, install_date, design_pressure, design_temperature, material, inspection_cycle, last_inspection_date, next_inspection_date, status_code, manager_name, notes, extra_a, extra_b, extra_c, cas_number, ghs_class, regulated_qty_kg, holding_qty_kg, psm_target, set_pressure, protected_equip, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, deleted, created_at, modified_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_psm_data WHERE deleted = 0 AND category = #{category} ORDER BY code OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM tb_psm_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tb_psm_data WHERE deleted = 0 AND next_inspection_date IS NOT NULL AND next_inspection_date <= DATEADD(day, 90, GETDATE()) ORDER BY next_inspection_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_data (category, code, name_ko, type_label, location, manufacturer, install_date, design_pressure, design_temperature, material, inspection_cycle, last_inspection_date, next_inspection_date, status_code, manager_name, notes, extra_a, extra_b, extra_c, cas_number, ghs_class, regulated_qty_kg, holding_qty_kg, psm_target, set_pressure, protected_equip, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{category}, #{code}, #{nameKo}, #{typeLabel}, #{location}, #{manufacturer}, #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{designPressure}, #{designTemperature}, #{material}, #{inspectionCycle}, #{lastInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{statusCode}, #{managerName}, #{notes}, #{extraA}, #{extraB}, #{extraC}, #{casNumber}, #{ghsClass}, #{regulatedQtyKg}, #{holdingQtyKg}, #{psmTarget}, #{setPressure}, #{protectedEquip}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_data SET category = #{category}, code = #{code}, name_ko = #{nameKo}, type_label = #{typeLabel}, location = #{location}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, install_date = #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, design_pressure = #{designPressure}, design_temperature = #{designTemperature}, material = #{material}, inspection_cycle = #{inspectionCycle}, last_inspection_date = #{lastInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_inspection_date = #{nextInspectionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status_code = #{statusCode}, manager_name = #{managerName}, notes = #{notes}, extra_a = #{extraA}, extra_b = #{extraB}, extra_c = #{extraC}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, ghs_class = #{ghsClass}, regulated_qty_kg = #{regulatedQtyKg}, holding_qty_kg = #{holdingQtyKg}, psm_target = #{psmTarget}, set_pressure = #{setPressure}, protected_equip = #{protectedEquip}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_data SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
